mapper.sql: id, application_id, material_type, file_name, file_url, file_size, mime_type, review_status, review_opinion, deleted, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO admission_material (application_id, material_type, file_name, file_url, file_size, mime_type, review_status, review_opinion) VALUES (#{applicationId}, #{materialType}, #{fileName}, #{fileUrl}, #{fileSize}, #{mimeType}, #{reviewStatus}, #{reviewOpinion})
mapper.update: UPDATE admission_material SET review_status = #{reviewStatus}, review_opinion = #{reviewOpinion}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE admission_material SET deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT FROM admission_material WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT FROM admission_material WHERE application_id = #{applicationId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY id DESC
